title: Is there way to group a view settings in a custom dashboard widget?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am currently developing a marketplace app (dashboard widget) and trying to setup the widget settings. Is there a way to group the fields from the view settings. Viewing the same as the screenshot below:

posts.author: lingatonglc (Louis Lingatong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I am currently developing a marketplace app (dashboard widget) and trying to setup the widget settings. Is there a way to group the fields from the view settings. Viewing the same as the screenshot below:

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @lingatonglc and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, it is not possible to group the fields from the settings.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: lingatonglc (Louis Lingatong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday, thank you for responding.

I see! Thanks.

One more question, for adding a settings of a custom dashboard widget, I knew that it can be done through View Setup → View Settings - Add Fields. And added fields rendered as an Advanced Settings in widget settings panel.

Is there a way to add a custom settings item and render it in widget settings panel like Timeline widget settings.

Timeline widget settings

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @lingatonglc,

That is not possible right now. The field you see there comes from a native monday dashboard widget, but it is not possible to add custom fields to the settings of a custom app.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
